name: Butternut Squash, Carrot & Parsnip Ragout
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Peeled and cubed butternut squash (about)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 large Leeks, trimmed (all but 2 inches of green removed), cleaned and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a shallow roasting pan on the stovetop, heat olive oil over medium heat.
3. Add squash, season with salt and pepper, and toss gently.
4. Add 1/2 cup of the stock and transfer the pan to the oven.
5. Bake for 15 minutes, or until squash is just tender; do not over cook.
6. Meanwhile, in a large nonstick skillet, heat butter over medium heat.
7. Add carrots, parsnips, sugar, salt, and pepper; cook until vegetables are lightly browned, about 3 minutes.
8. Add 1/2 cup of the stock, cover pan, and simmer until tender, about 10 minutes.
9. Transfer to a dish and set aside.
10. Add leeks and remaining 1/4 cup stock to skillet, season with salt and pepper; cover pan and simmer until tender, about 10 minutes.
11. Add reserved squash, carrots, and parsnips; toss gently.
12. Taste and adjust seasonings, adding a grating of nutmeg.
13. Simmer for an additional 3 to 4 minutes before serving.
